name: Mixed Greens with Corn Bread Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard any rough stems from the greens. Rinse them well in cold water.
2. Bring the 2 1/2 quarts water to a boil in a large kettle. Add onion and salt pork. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add the greens, salt, and pepper to taste. Add 1 teaspoon of sugar and simmer about 2 hours (simmer slowly).
4. In a mixing bowl, combine corn meal, flour, 1 teaspoon salt, and remaining sugar. Slowly add boiling water, stirring until you have a stiff, manageable mixture.
5. Wet the palms of your hands, break off bits of cornmeal dough the size of walnuts, and shape into balls.
6. Drop the dumpling balls into the boiling greens. Cover and continue cooking for 30 minutes.
